comment: EXAMPLE Act-1 story gates demonstrating the trigger + barrier layers. World pixels near the Onett control spawn (2112,1768). Replace text/coords/flags with real Swagbound story. Flow: a SOLID guard barrier blocks the road north until Malady (boss group 448) is cleared at the west gate. Boss-cleared flag is set when the fight starts (bosses block RUN). The warning trigger just south of the barrier delivers the flavor line.

dialogue: Something oily peels itself off the air. It is wearing your launch announcement as a face.
MALADY: "You minted hesitation. I mint certainty. Let's settle which one the town remembers."
Malady's faithful servants are planted across the road north. They will not budge for vibes alone.
Deal with Malady first. The road only remembers winners.
